name: Stampede Drilling Inc.
summary: Stampede Drilling Inc. provides drilling rig services for the oil and natural gas industry in North America. It provides land-based contract drilling rig services and leasing of contract drilling rigs. The company also provides operational management services in the United States. It operates 13 drilling rigs consisting of ten complementary heavy telescopic drilling rigs, one cantilever triple drilling rig, one light telescopic double rig, and one cantilever double drilling rig located in the provinces of Saskatchewan and Alberta. The company was formerly known as MATRRIX Energy Technologies Inc. and changed its name to Stampede Drilling Inc. in May 2019. Stampede Drilling Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
